name: Base L2 Agent Kit MCP
description: MCP server wrapping 9 x402-monetized endpoints for Base L2 operations: contract audit, gas estimates, yield farming, token analysis, wallet health, mnemonic generation, price feeds, DEX quotes

tools.name: contract_audit
tools.description: Smart contract vulnerability scan with Mythril

tools.name: base_gas_estimate
tools.description: Current Base L2 gas prices in gwei

tools.name: yield_farm
tools.description: Find yield farming opportunities on Base

tools.name: token_analyzer
tools.description: Analyze ERC20 token contract for risks

tools.name: base_price
tools.description: Get ETH or token price on Base
